zh.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathan Fiske於1672年1月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，他的父親Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr29歲，母親Elizabeth Fry32歲。他於1696年10月14日與Sarah Coolidge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托住了大約6年。他去世於1741年1月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年69歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nathan Fiske于1672年1月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，他的父亲Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr29岁，母亲Elizabeth Fry32岁。他于1696年10月14日与Sarah Coolidge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托住了大约6年。他去世于1741年1月26日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年69岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Nathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘he (God) has given’ in Hebrew (  compare  Nathaniel  ). This was the name of a prophet who had the courage to reproach  King David  for arranging the death in battle of Uriah the Hittite in order to get possession of the latter's wife Bathsheba (2 Samuel 12:1–15). It was also the name of one of David's own sons. In modern times this name has often been taken as a short form of   Nathaniel   or of   Jonathan .  Since the 1990s it has been much favoured throughout the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Nathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘he (God) has given’ in Hebrew (  compare  Nathaniel  ). This was the name of a prophet who had the courage to reproach  King David  for arranging the death in battle of Uriah the Hittite in order to get possession of the latter's wife Bathsheba (2 Samuel 12:1–15). It was also the name of one of David's own sons. In modern times this name has often been taken as a short form of   Nathaniel   or of   Jonathan .  Since the 1990s it has been much favoured throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathan Fiske was born on 3 January 1672, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Fry, was 32. He married Sarah Coolidge on 14 October 1696, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States for about 6 years. He died on 26 January 1741, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in Watertown, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nathan Fiske est né le 3 janvier 1672, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fry, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Coolidge le 14 octobre 1696, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis pendant environ 6 ans. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1741, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Watertown, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nathan Fiske am 3. Januar 1672 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Fry 32. Er hat am 14. Oktober 1696 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Coolidge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 6 Jahre lang in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 26. Januar 1741 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Watertown, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nathan Fiske è nato il il 3 gennaio 1672 nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Fry, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Coolidge il 14 ottobre 1696, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 6 anni. Morì il 26 gennaio 1741, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Watertown, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Nathan Fiskeが1672年1月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで生まれた時，父Lt. Nathan Fiske Jrは29歳，母Elizabeth Fryは32歳であった。1696年10月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでSarah Coolidgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼はアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンに約6年間住んでいた。彼は1741年1月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで69歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nathan Fiske(이)가 1672년 1월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Fry(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1696년 10월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Sarah Coolidge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 약 6년 동안 살았다. 그는 1741년 1월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nathan Fiske nasceu em 3 de janeiro de 1672, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Fry, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Coolidge em 14 de outubro de 1696, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América por quase 6 anos. Ele faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1741, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Watertown, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathan Fiske родился 3 января 1672 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fry, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Coolidge 14 октября 1696 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты около 6 лет. Он умер 26 января 1741 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности вэитиртоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nathan Fiske nació el 3 de enero de 1672, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Lt. Nathan Fiske Jr, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Fry, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sarah Coolidge el 14 de octubre de 1696, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos durante unos 6 años. Murió el 26 de enero de 1741, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Watertown, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
